$comment: Architecture map for the alix-prototype project. nodes = the moving parts (pages, prototypes, APIs, stores, externals). flows = step-by-step paths through them. Update when responsibilities move, a new endpoint lands, or a data path shifts. See .claude/skills/design-prototype/SKILL.md (flows.json section). Viewer: .designs/flows.html.

nodes.label: Home (hello world)
nodes.details: Server component. Fetches /api/hello with cache: no-store and renders the Postgres message + timestamp.

nodes.label: GET /api/hello
nodes.details: Runs SELECT 'hello world' AS message, NOW() AS now through the postgres (porsager) client.

nodes.label: Postgres 17 (docker)
nodes.details: alix/alix on localhost:5433 (5432 was taken by another project's hackathon-db-1 container).

nodes.label: postgres (porsager) npm
nodes.details: Tagged-template driver. Initialised once per API route module from process.env.DATABASE_URL.

nodes.label: @alixpartners/ui-components
nodes.details: Private npm registry. ESM-only, CSS side effects per component. Peers: react@^18.3.1, react-dom@^18.3.1, radix-ui, notistack.

nodes.label: .designs/vendor/alix-ui.js + .css
nodes.details: esbuild output bundling React, ReactDOM, and the lib (with peers) into a single ESM file + a single CSS file. Rebuilt only when the lib upgrades.

nodes.label: Finance dashboard prototype
nodes.details: Static HTML mounted by Babel-standalone + vendor bundle. End-of-day P&L snapshot, top movers, positions table, sidebar with alerts/settings/watchlist/notes.

nodes.label: Settings prototype
nodes.details: Eight sections (Profile, Notifications, Display, Trading defaults, Data sources, API keys, Security, Danger zone) behind a sticky side nav + sticky save bar.

nodes.label: Dashboard (EOD snapshot)
nodes.details: Real implementation of the finance-dashboard prototype. Server component shell + client component for filters and tabs.

nodes.label: GET /api/eod
nodes.details: Returns { pnl, winRate, tradeCount, netExposure, asOf } for a given date + account + asset-class filter.

nodes.label: GET /api/positions
nodes.details: Lists open positions with mark-to-market values for the dashboard table.

nodes.label: GET /api/trades
nodes.details: Trade blotter for the Trades tab. Powers the loading-state pattern in the prototype.

nodes.label: POST /api/reports/eod
nodes.details: Enqueues an emailed EOD summary to the desk distribution list. Returns 202.

nodes.label: CRUD /api/data-sources
nodes.details: Lists provider connections (Bloomberg, FactSet, Refinitiv, Yahoo, Internal). Status (live/stale/error) is derived from the latest health probe.

nodes.label: PATCH /api/me/notifications
nodes.details: Updates the current user's notification preferences (channels, event types, severity threshold, quiet hours).

nodes.label: PATCH /api/me/prefs
nodes.details: Display + trading defaults (theme, density, default order type, etc.).

nodes.label: CRUD /api/keys
nodes.details: Programmatic access. POST returns the plain-text secret ONCE; only the hash is persisted. DELETE sets revoked_at.

nodes.label: GET/DELETE /api/sessions
nodes.details: Active session list + remote revoke. Backed by the IdP.

nodes.label: ToastProvider (notistack)
nodes.details: Today each prototype wraps its own ToastProvider. Real impl should wrap the entire app tree exactly once so useToast() works from any client component.

nodes.label: positions table (PG)
nodes.details: Snapshot rows keyed by (account, symbol, as_of). Mark prices joined at query time.

nodes.label: trades table (PG)
nodes.details: Per-fill rows. Aggregated into KPIs and the Trades tab blotter.

nodes.label: user_ui_prefs / user_notification_prefs / user_trading_defaults
nodes.details: Per-user preference rows. Read on app boot (cookie/session) so theme applies on first paint.

nodes.label: api_keys table (PG)
nodes.details: Stores hashed secret, prefix, scope, created_at, last_used_at, revoked_at. Plain text NEVER persisted.

nodes.label: data_sources table (PG)
nodes.details: Connection config per provider. Status is derived at read time, not stored.

nodes.label: AlixPartners SSO (IdP)
nodes.details: Not yet wired. Required before dashboard and settings ship. Email comes from the IdP claim and stays disabled in the Profile section.

nodes.label: Email service
nodes.details: Delivers EOD summary + any future notification emails. Specific provider TBD.

nodes.label: Market data feeds
nodes.details: Bloomberg B-PIPE, FactSet AI-Ready, Refinitiv, Yahoo (fallback). Surfaced through api-data-sources.

steps.note: Server component issues the fetch during SSR.
SELECT 'hello world' AS message, NOW() AS now
{ message, now }
scoped by date + account + asset-class filters
aggregate fills for the date (count, win-rate)
sum mark-to-market exposure
current book for the Positions tab

flows.label: Dashboard filter change refetches KPIs + positions
flows.trigger: User changes Date / Account / Asset class / Closed-only

steps.note: filters serialized to query string; debounce 200 ms

flows.label: Send daily EOD report
flows.trigger: Dashboard sidebar → 'Send daily report' → Dialog confirm

steps.note: current filters in body so the email matches what the user sees
enqueue; do not block the request on delivery
202 Accepted
'Daily report queued for delivery.'

flows.label: Save settings preferences (any section)
flows.trigger: Settings → 'Save changes' (sticky save bar) while any section is dirty

steps.note: Notifications section diff
Display + Trading defaults diffs
'Settings saved.' Dirty pill flips green.

flows.label: Generate API key (show-once)
flows.trigger: Settings → API keys → 'Generate key' → confirmation Dialog

steps.note: name + scope in body
INSERT hashed key + prefix; return plain secret in response
secret shown ONCE in the show-once Dialog; not retrievable afterward
fires when the user clicks 'Copy' or closes the show-once dialog

flows.label: Revoke API key
flows.trigger: Settings → API keys row → Revoke → danger Dialog confirm

steps.note: DELETE /api/keys/:id
set revoked_at = now()

flows.label: Sign out a remote session
flows.trigger: Settings → Security → active session row → 'Sign out'

steps.note: DELETE /api/sessions/:id
PATCH /api/data-sources/:id { enabled }
if disabling, also revoke any active subscriptions to the feed

flows.label: Danger zone destructive action
flows.trigger: Settings → Danger zone → any action → danger Dialog (type-verb gate to be added in impl)

steps.note: varies per action: reset prefs, wipe watchlists, export+wipe local data, close account
'<Action> executed.'
.designs/vendor/entry.tsx re-exports the lib + React/createRoot; CSS side effects → alix-ui.css
../vendor/alix-ui.js
